regulatory_flags.rationale: Handles user identity data; jurisdiction unknown from source.

data_profile.context_note: Standard-tier app handling user auth. Findings should be reviewed in light of user data exposure risk.

dfd.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  subgraph internet["Public Internet"]
    user(["User"])
  end
  subgraph app["Application"]
    api["API Server"]
  end
  subgraph data["Data Tier"]
    db[("Database")]
  end
  user -->|"HTTPS"| api
  api -->|"SQL"| db

findings.title: SQL injection via unsanitised user_id parameter in /users/<id> route

evidence.quote: query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = {user_id}"

findings.exploitation_path: Attacker passes `1 OR 1=1` as user_id to dump the full users table.
findings.remediation: Use a parameterised query: `cursor.execute('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = %s', (user_id,))`
